response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive Staff-level experience, including building high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. While his resume lacks the required strong Python experience, his deep expertise in TypeScript, distributed systems, and modern agentic workflows strongly aligns with the core mindset and technical strategy requirements of the role.
strengths: Direct, hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and supporting agentic workflows.
Proven capability in designing high-throughput distributed systems, handling millions of HTTP requests per second.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, technical strategy, and agile methodologies like TDD and trunk-based development.
concerns: No visible experience with Python, which is listed as a must-have technical skill for the role.
A significant portion of his high-throughput backend experience relies on DLang rather than more widely adopted ecosystem languages.
The timeline on his most recent Staff Engineer role indicates a very short tenure or a date typo (April 2025).
